items.caption: A group of individuals in a warehouse setting, engaged in a discussion. the warehouse is filled with shelving units stocked with various items, and there are boxes and equipment on the floor. the individuals are dressed in business attire, suggesting a professional environment. the text overlay indicates that the image is related to the who guidelines for building management, specifically focusing on objectives such as bringing developed country methodologies to bear on developing country cold chain management, defining minimum requirements for storage and transportation time and temperature-sensitive pharmaceutical products, and developing a document that covers all key components of the supply chain. likely used to illustrate the practical application of these guidelines in a real-world setting.
